<!--
Title format: <type>(scope): short summary
  type: feat | fix | chore | refactor | docs | test | build | ci | perf
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences on what changed and why. -->

## Linked task / issue

<!-- e.g. T1.2, fixes #42 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Test only

## Test plan

<!-- How a reviewer can verify the change. -->

- [ ] Manual steps:
- [ ] Automated coverage (unit / integration / component / e2e):

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes — before/after, or short Loom. Delete if N/A. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run type-check` pass locally
- [ ] Tests updated / added where it makes sense
- [ ] No secrets, real PII, or production data in code or fixtures
- [ ] Schema / migration changes reviewed for backward compatibility
- [ ] Docs / runbooks updated if behavior changed
